label: IoMT Streaming ETL Pipeline
info:
Node-RED ETL pipeline: MQTT → Filter → Feature Engineering → HTTP /predict → MongoDB.
Luồng: HiveMQ Cloud → Cleanse → Enrich → Predict Label → Lưu realtime_health_data + raw_sensor (TTL 30 ngày).

name: 1. Filter & Normalize
2. Feature Engineering
Store sensorPayload
3. Build Data Lake & Strip Features
📋 Pipeline: MQTT → Filter → Features → /predict → MongoDB
info:
Architecture: Node-RED Streaming ETL

1. MQTT In: ptit/health/data tu HiveMQ Cloud
2. Filter & Normalize: Validate + outlier rejection
3. Feature Engineering: 8 derived features (mirrors train_model.py)
4. HTTP POST /predict: Python FastAPI ML endpoint
5. Build Data Lake: luu raw MQTT payload + rich metadata
6. MongoDB Output:
   - realtime_health_data: 12 engineered features (Datawarehouse)
   - datalake_raw: raw payload + metadata (Data Lake, vĩnh viễn)

Data Lake Schema (datalake_raw):
   source, source_topic, device_id, timestamp, mode,
   raw_payload, sensor, features, prediction,
   data_quality, schema_version, ingested_at, processing_latency_ms

ESP32 Payload fields:
   device_id, mode, timestamp, bpm, spo2, body_temp, gsr_adc,
   dht11_room_temp, dht11_humidity, confidence, dht11_bias

Luu y:
   - Python server phai chay tai http://localhost:8000
   - Hay import lai MQTT credentials sau khi import flow

name: ⚠ Nhập lại MQTT Username/Password sau import
info:
Nhấn đúp vào node 'HiveMQ' → Bấm hình cây bút ở HiveMQ Cloud Broker → Chuyển sang Tab Security và nhập lại:
Username: Ptit1234
Password: Ptit1234
(Node-RED tự xoá password khi export)
